ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND DISMISS OR STAY ACTION.

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-15-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT LENDINGCLUB BANK AND NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND DISMISS OR STAY ACTION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Or Stay Action
Off Calendar May-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT LENDINGCLUB BANK And NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Or Stay Action.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed motion to compel arbitration and stay action is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
